quoteFirst: And now, Caruso,     You have not budged one inch upon the road;   While half the lads have got their khaki trousseau,     You still retain that voice and nut-like mode;   Peace holds you with the tightness of a grapnel,     And, still adhering to her ample hem,   You enfilade us with your tuney shrapnel           From
